meta.title: Mazen Abdulaziz Hussein — Strategic & Operational Planning Consultant
meta.description: Consulting and training in strategic and operational planning, KPIs, OKRs, and Vision 2030 alignment. 20+ years of executive experience.

hero.name: Mazen Abdulaziz Hussein
hero.tagline: Translating long-range strategy into measurable operations across regulators, banks, and Vision 2030 programs — with twenty years of accountable execution.

about.title: A practitioner who turns strategy into operating reality.
about.lead: Mazen Abdulaziz Hussein is a senior consultant and trainer in strategic and operational planning. Over more than two decades, he has worked alongside government regulators, financial institutions, insurance leaders, and investment groups to design strategies that survive contact with execution.
about.body: His practice combines corporate strategy, operating models, KPI architecture, and OKR rollout — grounded in measurable outcomes rather than slideware. He partners directly with executive teams to convert direction into governance cadence, dashboards, and disciplined delivery.
about.vision: Active contributor to Vision 2030 enablement programs, including NDLIP and DARP, supporting national capability building in strategic planning.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Six focused engagements — selected by mandate, scoped to outcomes, delivered with executive sponsorship.

items.title: Strategic Planning Consulting
items.description: Corporate and business-unit strategy: diagnostics, ambition setting, strategic choices, and a board-ready execution map.

items.title: Operational Planning
items.description: Translating strategy into annual operating plans, capacity models, and quarterly delivery cycles tied to budget.

items.title: KPI Design & Dashboards
items.description: End-to-end KPI architecture — definitions, owners, baselines, targets — visualised in executive performance dashboards.

items.title: OKR Implementation
items.description: OKR rollout for leadership teams: cadence, scoring, alignment, and pragmatic integration with existing governance.

items.title: Strategic Training Programs
items.description: Accredited programs for executives and planning teams — strategy, KPIs, OKRs, and operational excellence.

items.title: Vision 2030 Alignment
items.description: Mapping institutional priorities to national objectives and Vision 2030 enablers, including NDLIP and DARP.

clients.title: Sectors and institutions served
clients.subtitle: A practice built on long-form mandates with regulators, financial institutions, and national authorities.

items.q: What is the typical engagement duration?
items.a: Most strategic planning engagements span 3-6 months, depending on organizational complexity. Training programs range from 2-day workshops to multi-week certification courses.

items.q: Do you work with government entities?
items.a: Yes. A significant portion of my practice involves government regulators, ministries, and Vision 2030 program offices. I hold the necessary certifications and clearances.

items.q: How do you ensure strategy execution, not just planning?
items.a: My methodology ties every strategic objective to operational plans, KPIs, and governance rhythms. I stay engaged through quarterly reviews to ensure accountability.

items.q: What languages are training programs delivered in?
items.a: All programs are available in both Arabic and English. Materials and facilitation can be fully localized to your organization's preferred language.

items.q: How do I book a consultation?
items.a: You can reach me directly via WhatsApp at +966 55 636 1166, or fill out the contact form on this page. Initial consultations are complimentary.
